section2_paragraph_reliability: We only sell reliable and tested business class computers for your work and entertainment needs
section3_about_us: Kompservisas is a store in Vilnius that sells reliable and carefully prepared used computers. We only offer high-quality, professionally checked and prepared devices for work and entertainment. We also provide <1>computer repair services</1> in Vilnius.
section4_preparation: Preparation. Before selling each computer, we check it with special equipment, perform cleaning, and update the software. In this way, we ensure that each device works efficiently and remains reliable for a long time.
section5_warranty: Warranty. We provide a 1 year warranty for all computers we sell.
section6_business_clients: Business clients. Our offer is an ideal choice for companies and organizations looking for reliable used computers in larger quantities. We offer competitive prices and special offers for businesses, taking into account your specific needs.
meta_data_page_meta_name: UAB Kompservisas | Used business laptops | Algirdo g. 32
meta_data_page_description: UAB Kompservisas - we sell used business class laptops and desktops for affordable prices. We also offer computer repair services.
